prize_targets: Arbitrum Open House London: Online Buildathon
primary_prize: Arbitrum Open House London: Online Buildathon
selected_prize_or_track: Arbitrum Open House London: Online Buildathon

judging_criteria.product_realness: fresh judge can run the refusal loop on the public URL
judging_criteria.arbitrum_usage: deployed Arbitrum Sepolia contracts and refused tx proof
judging_criteria.technical_depth: policy engine, receipt store, wallet path, calldata preparation, tx binding
judging_criteria.rwa_fit: market halt, stale price, max exposure, and no-sell-principal hazards

demo_format: public URL plus 3:30 combined pitch/demo video
killer_proof_phrase: 1 NO receipt names wallet and hashes
judge_recall_requirement: At least 2 of 3 cold judges can recall user + sponsor + outcome + proof after 10 seconds.
primary_sponsor_centrality_requirement: >=8.5/10 and removing the primary sponsor primitive breaks the core user outcome.
target_user_or_community: RWA builders and agentic wallet teams that need delegated action limits with reviewable proof.
winner_slot_sentence: Win the Arbitrum online buildathon by proving a refused RWA agent action becomes wallet-linked Arbitrum Sepolia receipt proof in 60 seconds.

proof_paths_ranked.target: Arbitrum Sepolia RefusalHub deployment and refused tx
proof_paths_ranked.how_to_get_before_submission: deploy contracts, prepare receipt calldata, bind the demo tx, and list addresses in deployment docs

proof_paths_ranked.target: 18 deployed E2E tests plus policy unit tests
proof_paths_ranked.how_to_get_before_submission: run public Playwright and Vitest suites against the deployed URL

proof_paths_ranked.target: fresh judge path with no login
proof_paths_ranked.how_to_get_before_submission: ship built-in test wallet and public receipt/auditor routes

kill_or_mutate_rules: Kill if the receipt cannot survive refresh.
Mutate if Arbitrum proof is decorative.
Cut features before cutting the refusal receipt loop.
